name: Italian Beans Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute garlic and onion until soft.
2. Add beans (entire can), tomatoes, and 3 cans of water to the pan.
3. When hot, add Italian seasoning. Bring to a boil.
4. Stir in pasta, carrots, and celery.
5. Cook until spices are well-blended and pasta is ready (about ten minutes).
6. Carrots should be slightly crunchy. Adjust seasonings if desired.
This makes a thick stew. If you prefer it wetter, add more water.
